---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, integration, or capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: turntducky
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of the problem or gap this addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe what you'd like to see built.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Would you be willing to contribute this?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting

## Additional Context
Any examples, references, or mockups.
